name: thermos
description: Thermo-nuclear branch review for Codex: deep correctness, security, and maintainability audits with sequential synthesis.

interface.shortDescription: Deep correctness, security, and maintainability reviews.
interface.longDescription: Thermo-nuclear branch review for Codex: diff-scoped correctness, security, developer-experience, feature-gate, and strict maintainability audits.
defaultPrompt: Run a thermos review of my current branch.
Audit this diff for correctness and maintainability.
